modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Computer won't start, showing non-system disk error.

full_description_text:  
So, I tried to turn on my computer, but it just won't boot up. I keep getting this error message about a non-system disk or disk error. It says "No Disk" and to strike any key when ready, but nothing happens. It's super frustrating!
short_description: Computer won't start, showing non-system disk error.
description: So, I tried to turn on my computer, but it just won't boot up. I keep getting this error message about a non-system disk or disk error. It says "No Disk" and to strike any key when ready, but nothing happens. It's super frustrating!
